meaning: bill [of money, e.g., a thousand-yen bill]
this direction, thing, person, or place
that direction, thing, person, or place
that direction, thing, person, or place over there
which direction, thing, person, or place
width, breadth, free room, difference (between two substances)
to raise or extend one's hands
to be disturbed, to become confused
to grow cold, to get chilly, to cool down
to wake, to become sober, to be disillusioned
to harden, to solidify, to become firm
to be filled, to be surrounded, to overflow
to be buried, to be covered
to celebrate, to be jubilant, to have joy, to have delight, to have rapture
to console, to consolate, to provide empathy
to be disinterested, to be bored, to be tired of, to be weary
to be astonished, to be surprised, to be scared
to exchange, to substitute, to replace
to rest, to take a break, to go to bed
to split intoin, to be divided
to partin, to separatein, to break upin
volitional ending [う for _u_-verbs, よう for _ru_-verbs]: "Let's…" or "I will"
causative ending [せる for _u_-verbs, させる for _ru_-verbs]: to make [someone do something], to allow

kanji: e.g., 食べられる, "to be eaten"\
meaning: passive verb ending [れる for _u_-verbs, られる for _ru_-verbs]: to be <verbed> [e.g., 食べられる, "to be eaten"]
indicates that it _seems_ the verb occurs [e.g., "It seems he ate"]
indicates that it _seems_ the verb occurs; also used to ask whether the verb occurs
archaic informal negative ["he hath", "thou didst", etc.]
things like <list of things>, including, such things as

_te_ form of verb or adjective [see [explanation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Japanese_verb_conjugations_and_adjective_declensions#Te_form "wikipedia:Japanese verb conjugations and adjective declensions")]
emphasis and question marker, equivalent to "right?"
the copula particle used after quasi-adjectives
particle indicating that the speaker is trying to recall some information ["What class is next _-kke_?"]

romaji: particle used to indicate that what precedes it is an extreme example and strongly negates it
meaning: ( _particle used to indicate that what precedes it is an extreme example and strongly negates it_)
